immediate_candidates.description: Antigravity/Codex coupling is low; safe to port as OMA CLI primitives first.

antigravity_research_required.description: Potentially valuable, but requires direct Antigravity/antigravity-cli surface mapping before implementation.

codex_coupled_hold.description: Codex-native behavior or state assumptions; hold until an Antigravity-native equivalent is designed.

state_memory_rebuild.description: Can be ported only after OMA owns an Antigravity-safe state/memory contract.

deprecated_or_low_priority.description: Do not prioritize unless a concrete Antigravity use case appears.
